args: apk add --no-cache       clang       docker       file       findutils       git       make       protoc       protobuf-dev

xx-go --wrap &&     if [ "$(xx-info os)" == "darwin" ]; then export CGO_ENABLED=1; export BUILD_TAGS=fsnotify,$BUILD_TAGS; fi &&     make build GO_BUILDTAGS="$BUILD_TAGS" DESTDIR=/out &&     xx-verify --static /out/docker-compose

mkdir -p /out &&     TARGETARCH=$([ "$TARGETARCH" = "amd64" ] && echo "x86_64" || echo "$TARGETARCH");     TARGETARCH=$([ "$TARGETARCH" = "arm64" ] && echo "aarch64" || echo "$TARGETARCH");     cp docker-compose* "/out/docker-compose-${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}${TARGETVARIANT}$(ls docker-compose* | sed -e 's/^docker-compose//')"

head_commit.message:
Fix panic when watch rebuilds without up

Signed-off-by: Max Proske <max@mproske.com>

organization.description: Docker helps developers bring their ideas to life by conquering the complexity of app development.

repository.description: Define and run multi-container applications with Docker
repository.name: compose
